name: Akulaku Southeast Asia BNPL and Digital Finance API
what_it_does: Akulaku Southeast Asia buy-now-pay-later and digital finance REST API for Southeast Asian e-commerce merchants and payment platforms to offer Akulaku BNPL installment payment options to consumers in Indonesia, Philippines, Malaysia, and Thailand — enabling interest-based installment checkout, virtual credit line integration, and digital lending product distribution through Akulaku's multi-country SEA digital finance platform. Enables AI agents to manage BNPL checkout for SEA installment payment automation, handle consumer redirect for Akulaku authentication automation, access payment confirmation for order fulfillment automation, retrieve transaction status for payment verification automation, manage refund for payment reversal automation, handle settlement for merchant disbursement automation, access webhook for payment event notification automation, retrieve credit eligibility for consumer finance automation, manage promotional rate for zero-interest campaign automation, and integrate Akulaku with SEA e-commerce, marketplace, and super app platforms for end-to-end multi-country BNPL automation.
use_cases: Offering BNPL installment checkout to Indonesian and Filipino consumers for e-commerce automation agents
Processing Akulaku virtual credit payments across Indonesia, Philippines, and Malaysia for merchant agents
Integrating Akulaku BNPL with SEA marketplace platforms for multi-country payment option automation agents
Receiving merchant settlements from Akulaku BNPL transactions for financial reconciliation automation agents
not_for: Western markets (Akulaku focuses on Southeast Asian emerging markets)
B2B enterprise procurement (Akulaku is consumer digital credit in SEA)
Physical POS-only retail without online component (Akulaku is primarily e-commerce focused)
best_when: A Southeast Asian e-commerce merchant, marketplace, or payment platform wanting AI agents to offer Akulaku BNPL installment options across Indonesia, Philippines, Malaysia, and Thailand through a single multi-country SEA BNPL integration.
avoid_when: MULTI-COUNTRY REGULATORY COMPLEXITY: Akulaku operates under OJK (Indonesia), SEC (Philippines), BNM (Malaysia) — each with different BNPL regulations; automated uniform regulatory assumption creates country-specific compliance gaps; automated must implement country-specific regulatory compliance for each market. CONSUMER REDIRECT REQUIRED: Akulaku BNPL requires consumer redirect to Akulaku app for credit approval and authentication; automated server-side payment initiation creates payment failure; automated must implement country-specific redirect flow. CREDIT APPROVAL IS DYNAMIC: Akulaku assesses consumer creditworthiness dynamically; automated guaranteed approval assumption creates unhandled decline state; automated must implement alternative payment fallback for Akulaku-declined consumers. API DOCUMENTATION IS PRIMARILY BAHASA INDONESIA: Akulaku API documentation is primarily in Bahasa Indonesia; automated English-only documentation assumption creates integration difficulty; automated international developers should use translation tools for Akulaku documentation.

auth.notes: Akulaku uses API key (merchant ID + secret key) authentication. REST API with JSON. Singapore HQ (Indonesia-focused operations). Founded 2014 by William Li. Products: BNPL (installment), virtual credit account, digital lending. SDKs: None public. OJK, SEC Philippines, BNM licensed. 10M+ users. Backed by Ant Group (Alibaba). 4 countries: Indonesia, Philippines, Malaysia, Thailand. Competes with Kredivo for Indonesian BNPL.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved merchants; production requires merchant agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Merchant discount rate (MDR) per transaction; country-specific rates
pricing.notes: Singapore/Indonesia. OJK, SEC, BNM. Ant Group-backed. MDR per transaction. 4 SEA countries.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; checkout APIs throttled; webhooks for payment events

known_agent_gotchas: DOCUMENTATION PRIMARILY IN BAHASA INDONESIA: Akulaku developer documentation is primarily in Bahasa Indonesia; automated English-only integration assumption creates documentation comprehension barrier; automated international developers must use translation for Akulaku documentation

COUNTRY-SPECIFIC REGULATORY COMPLIANCE: Each Akulaku country market (ID, PH, MY, TH) has different BNPL/digital lending regulations; automated uniform compliance assumption creates country-specific violations; automated must implement OJK, SEC Philippines, BNM compliant flows per country

CONSUMER REDIRECT IS MANDATORY: Akulaku BNPL requires consumer redirect to Akulaku credit approval flow; automated server-side payment initiation creates checkout failure; automated must implement country-specific redirect URLs for consumer authentication

CREDIT DECLINE MUST BE HANDLED: Akulaku dynamic credit assessment may decline consumers; automated guaranteed BNPL approval assumption creates unhandled error state; automated must offer alternative payment methods when Akulaku declines

MERCHANT AGREEMENT PER COUNTRY: Akulaku merchant agreements are country-specific; automated single agreement for all countries assumption creates country-specific access issues; automated must obtain separate merchant agreements for each target SEA market
agent_readiness.security_notes: SEA BNPL. OJK, SEC, BNM. API key. Indonesia/Philippines/Malaysia. Consumer credit and transaction data. Ant Group.

security_score_components.security_notes: SEA digital credit. OJK, SEC, BNM. API key. SE Asia. Consumer credit and transaction data.
